text: I am making this video for future self to remind her that time does definitely heal that it gets better with time. I'm super excited for this weekend going to celebrate my birthday and yeah man just looking forward to great company, great conversations and just enjoying my birthday weekend. Yeah, so this is just me reminding you KG that listen, life's not bad after all. Love you lots K.
